# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

parameters:
  webAppName:
    type: string
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
  location:
    type: string
resources:
  - apiVersion: '2018-11-01'
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    name: ${storageAccountName}
    location: ${location}
    sku: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2

  - apiVersion: '2016-06-30'
    type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    name: '${webAppName}/${sqlDatabaseName}'
    location: ${location}
    properties:
      requestMessage: null
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      catalogCollation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS

  - apiVersion: '2016-03-01'
    type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    name: ${webAppName}
    location: ${location}
    properties:
      siteConfig:
        minTuEnabled: true
        netFrameworkVersion: 'v52'
      serverFarm:
        id: /subscriptions/${subscription}/resourceGroups/${resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/${identityName}

  - apiVersion: '2016-06-01'
    type: Microsoft.Web/sites/config/web
    name: '${webAppName}/web'
    properties:
      connectionStrings:
        -
          name: MyDatabaseConnection
          connectionString: Database=sql_database_name;User ID=${sqlDbUsername};Password=${sqlDbPassword};Server=my_server_address

  - apiVersion: '2018-11-01'
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/queues
    name: '${storageAccountName}/queue1'

outputs:
  databaseConnectionString: 'DatabaseConnection="${sql_database_name};User ID=${sql_db_username};Password=${sql_db_password};Server=my_server_address'
